CONTENT.Club career: Born in Ripoll, Girona, Catalonia, Garrido joined the academy of Barcelona in 2012.He made his debut for the reserve team on 9 January 2022, in the Primera Federación. He scored his team's only goal in a 2–1 loss on home soil to Betis Deportivo.Garrido was called up to the Barcelona first team for the first time for a La Liga game against Elche, and went on to make his debut in the 4–0 win, coming on as a substitute for Ansu Fati. Following the game, manager Xavi praised his ability, describing him as technically gifted.
CONTENT.International career: Garrido has represented Spain at youth international level.

SUMMARY: Aleix Garrido Cañizares (born 22 February 2004) is a Spanish professional footballer who plays as a midfielder for Barcelona Atlètic.
